hero.title: Find Your Peace At Serenity Villa
hero.subtitle: A tranquil sanctuary for souls seeking stillness amid the majestic nature of Phu Quoc island.

booking.location: Ong Lang Beach, Phu Quoc, Kien Giang

amenities.label: A Refined Experience
amenities.title: Villa Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Enjoy thoughtfully designed facilities that bring you maximum relaxation.

items.title: High-speed Wifi
items.desc: Seamless connection across the entire villa grounds.

items.title: Infinity pool
items.desc: Ocean-facing views with cool water merging into the sky.

items.title: Private parking
items.desc: Safe, spacious parking right on the property.

items.title: Fully equipped kitchen
items.desc: Premium appliances for cozy home-cooked meals.

items.title: Air conditioning throughout
items.desc: Cool, comfortable air day and night.

items.title: 24/7 security
items.desc: A dedicated team ensuring your privacy and safety.

rooms.label: Restful Sleep
rooms.title: Thoughtfully Designed Retreats
rooms.subtitle: Every room at Serenity is designed to optimize rest, with neutral tones and natural materials.

items.name: Zen Garden Room
items.desc: Premium king-size bed with views over a calm tropical garden.

items.name: Pool View Suite
items.desc: Private balcony looking straight onto the infinity pool and Ong Lang sunset.

items.name: Bamboo Family Villa
items.desc: Two bedrooms, a private kitchen and a spacious living room for the whole family.

items.name: Sky Wellness Loft
items.desc: A quiet loft space with a private yoga deck to greet the morning sun.

welcome.label: A Heartfelt Welcome
welcome.title: Happiness Found In Simple Things
welcome.text: At Serenity, we believe happiness comes from the simplest things. A warm herbal tea, plates of fresh tropical fruit, and a handwritten welcome card will always be waiting the moment you arrive.
welcome.quote: We don't just offer a place to stay — we offer the feeling of coming home.

testimonials.title: Stories From Our Guests
testimonials.subtitle: Genuine reflections from guests who found their peace at Serenity.

items.quote: A stillness like nowhere else — the sound of waves and the scent of greenery melted all my stress away. The infinity pool at sunset is beyond words.
items.name: Thu Hang

items.quote: Our family of five stayed comfortably in the bamboo family villa, with a full kitchen to cook our own meals. Staff were wonderfully attentive and the welcome gift was so warm.
items.name: Mr. Quoc Bao

items.quote: We booked for our honeymoon and were not disappointed at all. The room was spotless and refined — we just wished we'd stayed a little longer.
items.name: Minh Thu

contact.title: A Prime Location
contact.subtitle: Set on the most tranquil stretch of Ong Lang beach on Phu Quoc island.
contact.address: Alley 4, Ong Lang Beach, Cua Duong, Phu Quoc, Kien Giang
